emptyStateDescription: Select a drive and click Analyze to visualize disk space usage.
failedToAnalyzeDescMakeAccessible: Make sure the drive is accessible
failedToAnalyzeErrorWindows: Failed to analyze drive {{drive}}:. Make sure the drive is accessible.
failedToAnalyzeErrorOther: Failed to analyze drive {{drive}}. Make sure the drive is accessible.
failedToScanFileTypesWindows: Failed to scan file types on {{drive}}:.
failedToScanFileTypesOther: Failed to scan file types on {{drive}}.
fileTypesEmptyDescription: Click Analyze first, then switch to File Types view to scan.
repairDescription: Use these built-in Windows tools to scan for and repair corrupted system files.
repairRunOrder: Run {{dism}} first to repair the component store, then {{sfc}} to fix system files.
dismCardDescription: Scans the Windows component store for corruption and repairs it using Windows Update. Run this before SFC if system files can't be repaired.
sfcCardDescription: Scans all protected Windows system files and replaces corrupted or missing files with a cached copy from the component store.
restartRecommended: A restart is recommended to complete repairs
adminRequiredSfcDesc: Relaunch LightClean as administrator to run SFC.
adminRequiredDismDesc: Relaunch LightClean as administrator to run DISM.
chkdskCardSubtitle: Check disk for file system errors
chkdskCardDescription: Scans the file system and metadata for errors. This is a non-destructive read-only scan that reports problems without making changes.
adminRequiredChkdskDesc: Relaunch LightClean as administrator to run CHKDSK.
maintenanceDescription: Run TRIM on SSDs to keep write performance and lifespan healthy.
trimInfoBody: TRIM tells your SSD which blocks are no longer in use so it can erase them ahead of time. The OS already does this on a schedule — running it manually only helps when that schedule has lagged. HDDs do not need TRIM.
trimEmptyNoDrives: Couldn't enumerate any drives on this system.
trimEmptyFiltered: No drives match the current filter.
trimConfirmDescription_one: TRIM will run on {{count}} selected drive. This requires administrator privileges and may briefly slow disk I/O.
trimConfirmDescription_other: TRIM will run on {{count}} selected drives. This requires administrator privileges and may briefly slow disk I/O.
adminRequiredTrimDesc: Relaunch LightClean as administrator to run TRIM.
trimThrottledToast_one: {{count}} drive was trimmed less than 24 hours ago — skipped
trimThrottledToast_other: {{count}} drives were trimmed less than 24 hours ago — skipped
